PowerShell(git commit -m "Pin iOS production build to latest EAS image \(Xcode 26 / iOS 26 SDK\)" -m "Apple now rejects builds made with the iOS 18.5 SDK \(error 90725\); the latest EAS image ships Xcode 26." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")
PowerShell(npx expo config --type public > $null 2> $env:TEMP\\expocfg.txt; Write-Output "ExitCode=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\expocfg.txt | Select-Object -First 15)

PowerShell(git commit -m "Fix iOS build: compile fmt pod as C++17 for Xcode 26 \(consteval error\)" -m "RN 0.79's vendored fmt uses C++20 consteval format-string checks that Xcode 26 / Apple Clang 21 rejects. A config plugin patches the generated Podfile to build only the fmt pod as C++17, falling back to runtime format validation." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")
PowerShell(npx expo config --type public > $null 2> $env:TEMP\\expocfg2.txt; Write-Output "ExitCode=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\expocfg2.txt | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(git commit -m "fmt fix: define FMT_USE_CONSTEVAL=0 globally \(not just fmt pod\)" -m "The consteval errors compile in folly/glog/React-Core \(which include fmt\), not the fmt pod itself, so scoping C++17 to the fmt target didn't help. RN's New Architecture needs C++20, so instead define FMT_USE_CONSTEVAL=0 on all pods to disable fmt's compile-time consteval format checks globally." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell(git commit -m "fmt fix via patch-package: user_target_xcconfig propagates FMT_USE_CONSTEVAL=0" -m "The Podfile post_install define didn't reach fmt's consumers. Patch RN's fmt.podspec to add user_target_xcconfig, which CocoaPods applies to every pod that depends on fmt \(folly, glog, React-Core\) where the consteval errors actually compile. Applied on EAS via patch-package postinstall." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")
PowerShell(npx expo config --type public > $null 2> $env:TEMP\\expocfg3.txt; Write-Output "ExitCode=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\expocfg3.txt | Select-Object -First 8)

PowerShell(git commit -m "fmt fix \(real\): patch fmt base.h to disable consteval on Apple clang" -m "Per fmtlib/fmt#4740, a -DFMT_USE_CONSTEVAL=0 flag is ignored because base.h unconditionally redefines the macro. fmt's own format.cc fails to compile under Xcode 26 / Apple clang 21. The config plugin now patches Pods/fmt/include/fmt/base.h in post_install, removing the Apple-clang version guard so FMT_USE_CONSTEVAL becomes 0 for all Apple clang \(runtime format validation\)." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell(git commit -m "Host privacy policy on web; drop iPad support; add debugging guide" -m "Put privacy-policy.html in public/ so Expo web export serves it at /privacy-policy.html for the App Store privacy policy URL. Set supportsTablet=false \(phone-only\) to skip iPad screenshots/review. Add DEBUGGING-GUIDE.md." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "AuthGate|LoadingScreen"; Write-Output "---web export \(validates metro resolver\)---"; npx expo export --platform web > $null 2> $env:TEMP\\webexp.txt; Write-Output "ExitCode=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\webexp.txt | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell(git commit -m "Fix native Clerk hang attempt: scope browser resolver to web + add on-screen auth diagnostic" -m "Native build hangs on Clerk init \(isLoaded stuck false; clerk-js fetch never resolves, cf clerk/javascript#8245\). \(1\) Scope the 'browser' metro resolver condition to web only so the device can't load a library's browser build \(Clerk's browser build does a window/Origin domain check that fails on native\). \(2\) Add a 10s on-screen diagnostic showing the publishable key prefix so we can distinguish missing-key vs reached-but-hanging without native logs \(temporary; remove once resolved\)." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell($v = \(Get-Command firebase -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($v\) { Write-Output "firebase: $\($v.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "firebase CLI not found" }; if \(Test-Path .firebaserc\) { Get-Content .firebaserc -Raw } else { Write-Output "no .firebaserc" })

PowerShell(git commit -m "Remove iPad support \(supportsTablet: false\) - phone-only, skip iPad screenshots" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); us=d.get\('user_settings',{}\); print\('=== restrictions ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(us.get\('restrictions',{}\),indent=2\)\); print\('=== sign_up ==='\); print\(json.dumps\(us.get\('sign_up',{}\),indent=2\)\); ac=d.get\('auth_config',{}\); print\('=== auth_config keys ==='\); print\(json.dumps\({k:ac.get\(k\) for k in \('single_session_mode','identification_strategies','identification_requirements'\)},indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); us=d.get\('user_settings',{}\); su=us.get\('sign_up',{}\); print\('DEV sign_up.mode =', su.get\('mode'\)\); print\('DEV captcha_enabled =', su.get\('captcha_enabled'\), '| widget =', su.get\('captcha_widget_type'\)\)")
